title: FeeSchedule
description: Vault fee configuration and the launch fee schedule. Saving a candidate is free; publishing a public vault costs 50 USDG. The creator performance fee (bps of profit above the high-water mark, launch cap 10%) carries a HISS protocol share (bps OF THE CREATOR FEE, max 20%). Routing fee is in tenths of a basis point. All fees are disclosed.

performanceFeeBps.description: Creator performance fee, bps of profit above the high-water mark. Launch cap 1000 (10%); verified creators up to 2000 (20%).

protocolShareBps.description: HISS protocol share, bps OF THE CREATOR FEE (never of principal). Launch 1000, max 2000.

routingFeeTenthBps.description: Routing fee in tenths of a basis point of rebalance notional. 0 while routing is disabled; 5 (0.5 bps) default; 20 (2 bps) advanced maximum.
